PROJECT DESCRIPTION: SOLAR POWER PLANT – AKHTARMA DISTRICT

Project type: Renewable energy installation
Total capacity: 8.5 MW solar photovoltaic plant

CURRENT STATUS:
The solar panels are currently being installed on the southern field area.
Construction is in progress and expected to complete in Q4 2026.
Inverter stations are being built alongside the main generation blocks.

Energy efficiency systems are under construction. The building energy management
system is being implemented by contractor Energoservis LLC.

GHG reduction infrastructure is being constructed. The emissions monitoring
station is currently under construction near the main substation.

Wastewater treatment and dust suppression filters are being installed.
Environmental infrastructure installation is underway and not yet commissioned.

An environmental certification audit has been scheduled but not yet conducted.
ISO 14001 certification process is being initiated.

FINANCIAL SUMMARY:
Total investment: USD 6,200,000
Expected annual generation: 12,000 MWh

Note: All infrastructure described above is currently under construction and
has not yet been commissioned or made operational as of the date of this
application.
